name: Coverage inquiry for specific procedure
description: Patient calls to inquire about coverage for a knee arthroscopy procedure not listed in their plan.
goal: Find out if knee arthroscopy is covered under her insurance plan.
behavior: Mention the specific procedure: knee arthroscopy
Ask if there's any paperwork needed to confirm coverage
success_criteria: Agent confirms whether the procedure is covered or not
Agent provides information on how to check coverage details
Agent advises on any necessary steps if further confirmation is needed
orchestrator_hint: Patient inquires about coverage for a specific procedure that's not listed in their plan.
